g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields does the travel form collect?')
sendPrompt('What does the Config node store?')
sendPrompt('How does the Gemini intent parser extract airport codes and dates?')
sendPrompt('How does the Parse Gemini Response node handle markdown-wrapped JSON?')
sendPrompt('How does the SerpAPI flight search work?')
sendPrompt('How does the SerpAPI hotel search work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Combine Results merge node do?')
sendPrompt('What is the Budget Agent prompt and how does persona steering affect it?')
sendPrompt('What is the Experience Agent prompt and how does persona steering affect it?')
sendPrompt('What does Merge Agent Results output?')
sendPrompt('Why is the Prepare Judge Body code node needed?')
sendPrompt('How does the Judge Agent evaluate the two proposals?')
sendPrompt('Why is the Prepare Critic Body code node needed?')
sendPrompt('What risks does the Critic Agent flag?')
sendPrompt('How does Extract HTML append the feedback button?')
sendPrompt('How does the Gmail node send the HTML email?')
sendPrompt('What fields are on the feedback form?')
sendPrompt('What does Feedback Config store?')
sendPrompt('How does the Refinement Agent use the original destination context?')
sendPrompt('How does Extract Revised HTML strip the Subject line?')
sendPrompt('How does the revised itinerary email get sent?')
